notes: Single-declaration milestone assembly file: wires GapSpines (ker_deg_skeleton, qf_nonneg_skeleton, isogOneSub_negFrobenius) and Hasse.QuadraticForm (hasse_bound_of_full_qf_nonneg_witnesses) into the top-level Hasse bound. The body is a 4-line term-mode application with no sorry; sorryAx traces only to the qf_nonneg_skeleton leaf.
